Class ContractDao

java.lang.Object
org.example.oopjavagroupproject.data.ContractDao
public class ContractDao extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) for handling CRUD operations for the Contract entity. This class provides methods to interact with the 'Contract' table in the database, performing necessary joins to populate related entities like Student, Room, and Faculty.

  • Constructor Details

      public ContractDao()

  • Method Details

    • getAllContracts

      public List<Contract> getAllContracts()
      Retrieves all contracts from the database. It performs JOINs with Student, Room, and Faculty tables to build complete Contract objects.
      Returns:
      A list of all Contract objects. Returns an empty list if an error occurs.

    • addContract

      public void addContract(Contract contract)
      Adds a new contract to the database.
      Parameters:
      contract - The Contract object to add. The contract's ID is ignored.

    • updateContract

      public void updateContract(Contract contract)
      Updates an existing contract in the database.
      Parameters:
      contract - The Contract object with updated information. The contract is identified by its ID.

    • deleteContract

      public void deleteContract(int id)
      Deletes a contract from the database by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the contract to delete.
